{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320122905D82F5413525CF8815C47"}"},"total":2},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7611191245012714302","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本小说真的挺好看！剧情紧凑不拖沓，人设也很讨喜，越看越上头，值得一看！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772120029,"group_id":"7600061627622231065","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"大学生，干啥啥不行,平时打打游戏，主打摆烂","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nz6hD3jt1pRYO/5+KCDH17F0WTxTEGaytotynMXkjRV9","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/4aed7eedb85c4aa09b53058d44574383~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776528999&x-signature=lrkkA0iOa3w6jVIEkHiDkRDbK9U%3D","user_id":"3158216346451821","user_name":"拾吉安"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3158216346451821","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7600061627622231065","book_info":{"abstract":"贱人主角，曲折不无脑，多女主，魂穿，无系统，玄幻，且看贱人蒋尘的登顶之路
鄙人的第一本书，我希望它能成长到有一天能狠狠地将我压在身下。
当然，我指的是这本书小有成就。
而不是我天天拿着键盘压着它敲敲敲……
它不必完美，我也不求它完美。只要带着我的疯劲，一路“嚣张跋跎”的闯下去。
然后看着它在书海里野蛮生长。
或许等哪一天它炙手可热到需要我求着它在我身上写字……
当然，本人这里指的是签名。
我想，那才是我作为一个作者的最大成就。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/e6a1f6f70158a39a508d9a0d25981fd2~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"妄筏","author_id":"","book_id":"7600061627622231065","book_name":"我一贱人逆点天怎么了？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181810","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1140,"name":"东方仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140&name=东方仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":520,"name":"大佬","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=520&name=大佬&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7600061672627126809","read_count":"36","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"109634"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"26","tags":"东方仙侠,东方玄幻,玄幻,多女主,大佬,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/e6a1f6f70158a39a508d9a0d25981fd2~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779164945&x-signature=Uu99PA13vqICKYllWyBR%2BkvSjSc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4306151673440878","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"5"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320122905D82F5413525CF8815C47"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读32分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_cou
